# FundiPlug

> Kenya's marketplace to hire verified fundis - plumbers, electricians, masons, carpenters and skilled workers. Pay safely with M-Pesa.

FundiPlug connects clients with vetted skilled workers ("fundis") across Kenya. Clients can post jobs, hire instantly, chat in-app, and pay via M-Pesa. Fundis manage their profile, accept jobs, track earnings, and withdraw to mobile money.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of FundiPlug and entry point to sign in or sign up.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Authentication for clients and fundis.

## Optional

- [Public fundi reviews](/reviews/): Read client reviews for an individual fundi (dynamic route, /reviews/{workerId}).
